song_details.name: Padumanabha

Pa du  ma | na - | bha - || pa ra ma | pu ru | sha - ||
content.sahitya: ... the personification of eternal flame (“paramjyothi swarupa”) of life ..

content.sahitya: He is perched (“adhirohana”) on the prodigious bird Garuda (“vihanga”)..

content.sahitya: I praise thee ("namo namo") who bestow (“vara daayaka”) everything on his followers (“vibhow”).
